name: generate_document
description: Routing proxy: dispatches to generate_docx, generate_xlsx, or generate_pptx based on the `format` field. Prefer calling the format-specific tool directly when the format is known.

format.description: The document format to generate. Determines which specialized tool handles the request.

path.description: Output file path (absolute or relative to a source directory). Must be within a registered source directory.

content.description: Structured content for the document. Schema depends on the format chosen — see generate_docx, generate_xlsx, or generate_pptx for details.
